description: __Height__: 167cm __Occupation__: Chuunin Examiner Anko Mitarashi is the proctor for the second exam of the Chuunin Selection Exams and leader of the Infiltration and Reconnaissance Party. Anko was once the student of Orochimaru. Later she, along with nine others, were branded with Orochimaru's first ten samples of the Cursed Seal of Heaven. description: __Height:__ 160 cm Erio is [Makoto](https://anilist.co/character/40874)'s first cousin. name: Tae Shimura
description: __Height:__ 168 cm Tae Shimura is [Shinpachi](https://anilist.co/character/673)'s older sister. She runs the Kakidokan Dojo—which was her father's failing dojo—with her brother. She is usually addressed as "Otae"; the "O" is an honorific used to refer to women. [Kagura](https://anilist.co/character/674) always addresses her as "big sister" (anego). name: Kabuto Yakushi
description: Kabuto Yakushi is Orochimaru's personal medic, assistant, and general right-hand man. Kabuto was found as a young boy by a chief medical officer of the Konoha Medical Unit Squad. The officer brought Kabuto with him back to Konoha and raised him as a son. Kabuto eventually began acting as a spy for numerous countries and organizations (such as Akatsuki) before coming under the servitude of Orochimaru. Kabuto has since used his various former affiliations as a means to gather intelligence on Oroch

name: Lilith
description: One day, a suspicious maid suddenly appeared in front of Yuuri. Characterized by her jet-black hair, tan skin, and piercing purple eyes. She is very suspicious to Yuuri because she doesn't like to talk about herself very much and she tends to keep things secret. (Source: Official Site)

Moca has a sleepy demeanor and speaks with a slow, monotone voice, but can be surprisingly sly. Although everyone in Afterglow are childhood friends, Moca is particularly close to Ran. Outside of the band, she's also friends with Lisa, whom she works part-time with at the same convenience store, as well as Saaya. name: Niccolo
description: Nicolo is a former Marleyan soldier who served on Marley's Navy and was part of the first survey fleet to Paradis Island after the failed Paradis Island Operation. name: Inaho Kaizuka
description: __Height:__ 164 cm Inaho is a young boy of average height and short tousled black hair. His eyes hold a burgundy color and he has a blank gaze. He is seen in his high school standard uniform which consists of a white shirt, red tie and white sweater, along with a light brown blazer on the outside and black pants. His backpack is dark blue. Inaho is a calm, intelligent boy. Even at times of great distress, he calmly thinks of a way out. He is intuitive and not afraid to go on many different tacti

name: Jean Gunnhildr
description: __Origin:__ Mondstadt __Constellation:__ Leo Minor As the Acting Grandmaster of the Knights, Jean has always been devoted to her duties and maintaining peace in Mondstadt. She had taken precautions long before the onset of Stormterror's assault, and she will guard Mondstadt with her life as always. Barbara is her younger sister.

name: Nobunaga Oda
description: A famous warlord who conquered most of Japan during Sengoku period. Historically he is known for being the daimyo who took the first step of unification of the Japan, and the first Japanese military commander to utilize arquebuses in battles. Perhaps because of this, as a Drifter he uses an arquebus in battle. He died twenty years before Toyohisa (1582). As a Drifter, he has only aged six months since arriving in the new world.

name: Ryouko Sakaki
description: Ryōko is a tall, mature-looking girl with long purple hair, orange eyes, and a large bust. She is gentle and kind, responding to the eccentrics of the other Polar Star residents in a level-headed manner and comforting the other students when they are troubled. Ryōko's specialty is fermented foods due to her parents owning a well-known fermented-goods shop, and she maintains a workshop near the dorms to produce her own ingredients. She also keeps a bottle of "fermented rice drink" that she would

name: Setsuna Ogiso
description: Setsuna is a third year student at Houjou High. She has been Miss Houjou two years in a row and enjoys singing karaoke. Setsuna likes singing "White Album", a song from the first White Album visual novel. ~!In her True Ending, she marries Haruki Kitahara !~
